title: UK weather: Yellow wind warnings to come into force with possible mountain snow
description: Strong winds are likely across many parts of the UK and conditions are turning colder towards the end of the week.
content:
Met Office warnings for wind have been issued for northern areas of the UK on Thursday - with the risk of some transport disruption.

title: Kanye West ordered to pay $140K in Malibu mansion renovation case
description: A handyman had sought $1.7m (£1.267m) from the rapper over claims of unpaid work, medical expenses and being unfairly fired.
content:
A jury has ordered controversial US rapper Kanye West to pay $140,000 (£104,415) after a handyman sued him over unpaid work for renovations at his Malibu mansion.
The verdict in the trial in Los Angeles came after Tony Saxon claimed the rapper, also ... [3722 chars]

title: Starmer overruled warning of ‘reputational risk’ over Mandelson appointment, files show
description: Newly released documents also show Peter Mandelson was offered highly classified briefings before formal vetting was complete
content:
Keir Starmer overruled officials who warned of a “reputational risk” in making Peter Mandelson US ambassador, despite being handed a dossier of evidence about the peer’s relationship with the sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, documents reveal.

title: Epstein used modelling agent to recruit girls, Brazilian women tell BBC
description: Modelling agent used businesses to recruit girls and arrange US visas to visit Jeffrey Epstein, Brazilian women tell BBC.
content:

title: Inquiry into student loans launched by MPs
description: The Treasury Committee will look at whether "the goalposts [have] been moved in a way which is unfair".
content:
An inquiry into student loans is being launched by MPs amid "widespread dissatisfaction" over repayment terms.
The Treasury Committee will examine whether the recent decision to freeze the repayment threshold for many graduates in England is fair.
